content.en:
After investigating and searching, Ye Tian finally found a very good dimensional treasure, whose value far exceeded that of the Ten Pivot Gold Plate, and was even above the Thirteen Tribulations and Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Towers.

Silver Mystery Illustrated Book!

This is a medium-dimensional Tongbao, with the effect of deduction and analysis, the effect is far above the Ten Pivot Gold Plate, and it also has side effects, that is, it will consume its own potential, and if it is used for a long time, it will deplete the potential of the body, resulting in refining resources are difficult to improve cultivation, and the qualification will be very poor.

But it had no effect on Ye Tian.

However, the value of the Silver Xuan Illustrated Book is very high, and he can't afford it now.

After all, the Yinxuan Illustrated Book is a medium-dimensional treasure, worth 300 million multi-dimensional treasures, and many of the Sixth Realm can't afford it.

"It seems that we must earn more resources in the coming years!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Many of the resources in the upper domain are in the hands of those big forces, and it is difficult for ordinary casual cultivators to obtain a lot of resources.

But as long as you don't 31 are afraid of falling, there are still many ways to obtain resources.

For example, the Tianshu battlefield.

The Tianshu Battlefield is a battlefield opened up by the Tianshu Sect in the twelfth dimension, and the Tianshu Sect wants to seize a territory in the twelfth dimension, where the resources are extremely rich, but the multi-dimensional beings there struggle to resist, which forms the Tianshu Battlefield.

In order to gain an advantage, the Tianshu Sect allowed a large number of forces and scattered cultivators to participate, and could take away half of the treasures.

In such a war, the fifth realm is completely cannon fodder, even the ordinary sixth realm is only a powerful cannon fodder, only those top sixth realms or sixth realms can be called invincible existences, are the main force of war.

As for the seventh realm, they will hardly make a move, this is also an agreement between the two sides, if the seventh realm makes a move, the war will escalate, and those seventh realms are also very sorry for their lives, and they will not fight for a territory.

Although the Fifth Realm is cannon fodder when they enter the Tianshu battlefield, the resources there are really rich, there are too many good things, and just getting a treasure is enough to rise.

Therefore, the Fifth Realm is desperately trying to enter the Tianshu Battlefield and come back as long as there is some gain.

However, there are very few Fifth Realms that can really endure it, and even if most of the Fifth Realms have gains, they will continue to stay there and eventually be killed in battle.

"Let's go to the Tianshu battlefield, I can't enter the twelfth dimension, I can only use the dimensional channel of the Tianshu Sect to enter the battlefield of the twelfth dimension, which is also the easiest way to accumulate wealth quickly!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian applied to sign up to enter the Tianshu battlefield.

Now, the battle line of the Tianshu battlefield is tight, and there is an extreme lack of cannon fodder, so he naturally agreed to Ye Tian's application at the first time, and he would not check Ye Tian's background.

Soon, Ye Tian obtained permission and went directly to the Tianshu battlefield.

......

In front of an incomparably large dimensional passage, Ye Tian stood on a platform with a group of Fifth Realms and a few Sixth Realms.

The next moment.

They were all sucked into the dimensional passages.

Ye Tian sensed an incomparably powerful dimensional rule from this dimensional channel, far beyond the ninefold dimensional rule, which was a level that he did not understand at the moment, and it should have been arranged by the seventh realm.

Soon.

They passed through the dimensional passage and descended into the twelfth dimension.

Rumble!!!!

The heavy sense of oppression in the twelfth dimension struck, causing many of the Fifth and Sixth Realms to stagnate.

But soon, they got used to it a little.

At this moment, they are located in a huge giant city in the twelfth dimension, this giant city was established by the Tianshu Sect, and it is also their base and temporary repair point, and most of the time they have to enter the battlefield to fight.

As soon as Ye Tian came here, he heard a large number of shouts.

"Tianshu No. 009 team urgently needs thirty super-dimensional realms at the peak of the sixth realm, they don't need to be assessed, they can join directly, who will come?"

"Tianshu No. 9867 team is recruiting ten people from the peak of the fifth realm or the early stage of the sixth realm of the super dimensional realm, and they will ask for it when they come!"

These teams are formed by a group of strong people and hold each other, otherwise it is too easy for a single person to fall on the battlefield, and if you encounter a multi-dimensional life team, you will be easily wiped out.

And many extra-dimensional realms are united together, and their combat power is even stronger, even if they encounter mortal danger, if they escape, maybe they will have a back, and they will not fall.

In a word.

When most of the extradimensional realms come here, they will choose to form a team, even if they don't join the teams of other powerhouses, they will also form their own teams.

But Ye Tian knew his situation very well, he was not suitable for teaming, otherwise, once he showed the Five Realms Supreme Strength, he would definitely be noticed by the Tianshu Sect, and he would not be able to keep a low profile when the time came.

Of course.

He also knew that he could not be invincible in the Tianshu battlefield, and many of the superdimensional realms at the peak of the sixth realm were above him, but he was not afraid of falling!

If he falls, he can continue to condense the copy body, and in such a situation, the efficiency of accumulating resources must be very fast.

Here he learned about the situation, such as the distribution of the battlefield and the danger level of the area.

After understanding, Ye Tian entered the battlefield.

Even if he didn't want to enter, there would be a super-dimensional realm of the Tianshu Sect to drive him into the Tianshu battlefield in the future, and no one would be able to go down here.

Swish!

Ye Tian entered the Tianshu battlefield and headed towards a territory with a medium degree of danger, suitable for the early and middle stages of the 973 Sixth Realm, but if he was unlucky, the strong would come here to fry fish, and that would be a normal situation.

Therefore, there is no absolute fit for any area, and it can only be said that this is the case under normal circumstances.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to a place that seemed to be quiet and had few resources, where he began to condense his copy body.

After the copy body was condensed, Ye Tian asked the copy body to collect resources, and his copy body was waiting here.

......

"The resources are indeed abundant, this is a fragment of dimensional rules, I didn't expect it to be here, you can pick it up directly!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

In the 5,000th Territory, just such a fragment is enough to kill all of the Fifth Realm, and the result is like a spicy chicken here.

Ye Tian didn't dislike it, and picked it up directly.

In any case, this fragment must be worth at least a few multi-dimensional treasures!

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to look for resources, no matter what the resources were, he didn't dislike them, it was completely carpet-scraped, anyway, even if he couldn't sell them, it would be better to send them back to the human race when the time came.

this day.

Ye Tian finally encountered a group of multi-dimensional beings, and this group of multi-dimensional beings sensed Ye Tian and killed him directly.
